articles.title: Prediction Markets Break Records as Scrutiny Grows in March
articles.summary: Prediction markets hit new trading volumes and activity levels in March while facing increased regulatory and media attention. The surge in both usage and scrutiny suggests the industry is reaching a tipping point where mainstream adoption and potential crackdowns are happening simultaneously.

articles.title: Lucrative bets that anticipated Trump's policy surprises warrant scrutiny, experts say
articles.summary: Some bettors made suspiciously well-timed wagers on Trump policy moves before they were publicly announced, raising questions about potential insider trading in prediction markets. If regulators crack down on information asymmetries, it could fundamentally change how political betting markets operate and what edge strategies actually work.

articles.title: Kalshi Referral Code MASSLIVE1 extended: $10 NBA bonus for Celtics vs. Hornets tonight
articles.summary: Kalshi is extending their MASSLIVE1 referral promotion with a $10 bonus for tonight's Celtics vs. Hornets game. The extension signals strong user acquisition competition among prediction platforms, especially around high-visibility NBA matchups that drive trading volume.

articles.title: Prediction Markets Should Be Regulated
articles.summary: A new push for prediction market regulation is gaining momentum as the industry grows beyond its scrappy startup roots. Smart money knows that clear rules beat regulatory limbo, and proper oversight could unlock institutional capital that's been sitting on the sidelines.

articles.title: Duke vs UConn Predictions: Kalshi Odds and Markets
articles.summary: Duke faces UConn in what appears to be a high-profile matchup with active betting markets on Kalshi showing live odds and prediction data. The game likely represents a significant liquidity opportunity for prediction market traders, especially given both programs' national followings and tournament implications.

articles.title: Pints meet prop bets: Polymarket’s “Situation Room” pop-up bar in DC
articles.summary: Polymarket opened a temporary "Situation Room" bar in Washington DC, mixing drinks with live prediction market betting during what's likely election coverage. The move signals prediction markets are pushing into mainstream social spaces, turning political betting from a niche online activity into a real-world spectator sport.

articles.title: Wealthsimple is a step closer to offering prediction markets, experts say it is a ‘slippery slope’
articles.summary: Wealthsimple, Canada's largest robo-advisor with over $15B in assets, is reportedly moving toward launching prediction markets alongside its existing investment products. If a mainstream financial platform successfully integrates prediction markets, it could legitimize the space for millions of retail investors who currently view it as gambling rather than sophisticated forecasting.

articles.title: Opinion: Congress can rein in out-of-control prediction markets
articles.summary: Someone thinks Congress should step in to regulate prediction markets that have gotten too wild for comfort. If lawmakers actually act, it could kill the fun stuff like election betting and force platforms to stick to boring economic indicators that nobody wants to trade.

articles.title: Washington sues Kalshi as states ramp up legal pressure against prediction markets
articles.summary: Washington state filed a lawsuit against Kalshi, joining a growing wave of state-level legal challenges targeting prediction markets. The coordinated state pushback could force platforms to navigate a patchwork of conflicting regulations, potentially limiting where Americans can legally bet on political and economic outcomes.

articles.title: Dan Patrick adds data centers, prediction markets and THC to Senate priorities
articles.summary: Texas Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick has announced that data centers, prediction markets, and THC legislation will be among his top priorities for the upcoming Senate session. The prediction markets inclusion signals growing state-level acceptance of political betting platforms, which could accelerate regulatory clarity and expansion opportunities across other red states.

articles.title: The failures of prediction markets are predictable
articles.summary: Prediction markets consistently stumble over the same obstacles: thin liquidity, manipulation attempts, regulatory uncertainty, and the eternal struggle between accuracy and popularity. These recurring failures reveal systematic weaknesses that smart bettors can exploit and market operators must finally address if they want to scale beyond niche curiosities.

articles.title: Kalshi Secures License to Offer Margin Trading to Pros
articles.summary: Kalshi just got regulatory approval to let professional traders use borrowed money when betting on their prediction markets. This puts them on more equal footing with traditional financial exchanges and should bring in bigger players with deeper pockets who can move markets more efficiently.
